name: My Size, Inc.
summary: Overview We are an omnichannel e-commerce platform and provider of AI-driven SaaS measurement solutions and our recently acquired subsidiaries, Naiz Fit, which provides SaaS technology solutions that solve size and fit issues and AI solutions for smarter design through data driven decisions for fashion ecommerce companies, and Orgad, an online retailer operating in the global markets.
